name: NeilofNeils
title: NeilofNeils
description: Writing and projects from Neil Williams on practical software, AI workflows, legal discovery systems, and useful tools that do real work.
intro: I build practical software and AI systems with a bias for clarity, usable tools, and real workflows.
positioning: This is where I write about products, local-first AI, legal discovery systems, and the tools I am building.

about.name: Neil Williams
about.headline: Builder, operator, and systems thinker working across software, AI workflows, and legal discovery data.
summary: I like building tools that reduce friction, preserve signal, and make real work easier to do.
My projects tend to live where product judgment, technical implementation, and workflow reality meet: practical software, AI systems, discovery tooling, and small useful infrastructure.
currently: Building products and experiments that stay useful in the real world.
Working on AI orchestration, retrieval, and workflow design that can survive contact with actual use.
Writing about the systems, tradeoffs, and projects that seem worth showing in public.

now: Keeping the publishing flow local, simple, and easy to use once real material starts moving in.
Running the public site as one posts feed instead of splitting attention across thin sections.
Cutting public fluff until there is enough material to earn anything beyond the feed.
